title: Transit Committee - June 11, 2026
meeting_location: Champlain Room, 110 Laurier Avenue West, and by electronic participation

agenda_items.title: Notices and meeting information for meeting participants and the public

attachments.attachment_title: Public Notices English - Hybrid Standing Committee 2025 (AODA).pdf
Public Notices French - Hybrid Standing Committee 2025 (AODA).pdf

agenda_items.description:
Notices and meeting information are attached to the agenda and minutes, including: availability of simultaneous interpretation and accessibility accommodations; in camera meeting procedures; information items not subject to discussion; personal information disclaimer for correspondents and public speakers; notices regarding minutes; and hybrid participation details.
Accessible formats and communication supports are available, upon request.
Except where otherwise indicated, reports requiring Council consideration will be presented to Council on Wednesday, June 24, 2026 in Transit Committee Report 27.
The deadline to register by phone to speak, or submit written comments or visual presentations is 4 pm on Wednesday, June 10, 2026, and the deadline to register to speak by email is 8:30 am on Thursday, June 11, 2026.
agenda_items.minutes: These “Summary Minutes” indicate the disposition of items and actions taken at the meeting. This document does not include all of the text that will be included in the full Minutes, such as the record of written and oral submissions. Recorded votes and dissents contained in the Summary Minutes are draft until the full Minutes of the meeting are confirmed by the Committee. The draft of the full Minutes (for confirmation) will be published with the agenda for the next regular Committee meeting and, once confirmed, will replace this document.

sub_agendas_items.title: Council Motion 2025-71-13 Reinstating Saturday service -OC Transpo Bus Route 92

attachments.attachment_title: Referred Council Motion report 2025-71-13 - Route 92 - BIL.pdf

sub_agendas_items.description: File No. ACS2026-OCC-CCS-0079 - River (16), Alta Vista (18)

motions.motion_text:
Recommendation(s)
That Transit Committee consider the attached Motion referred from the City Council meeting of December 10, 2025.

WHEREAS Council Motion 2025-71-13, titled“Reinstating Saturday Service – OC Transpo Bus Route 92,”was referred by Council to Transit Committee to be examined by Q2 2026; and
WHEREAS the referral motion provided that consideration of the matter be accompanied by an analysis by staff of the capacity within the system to restore routes and a methodology for prioritizing routes to use that capacity; and
WHEREAS as part of the new Customer-First Action Plan, staff are analyzing opportunities for short- and long-term improvements to OC Transpo bus service delivery.
THEREFORE BE IT RESOLVED that Council Motion 2025-71-13, titled“Reinstating Saturday Service – OC Transpo Bus Route 92,”be deferred to the next regular Transit Committee meeting, currently scheduled for September 10, 2026; and
BE IT FURTHER RESOLVED that staff be authorized to provide updated staff comments reflecting available information to accompany this item when it is listed on the next committee agenda.

agenda_items.minutes: There were no in camera items.

agenda_items.minutes: There were no Notices of Motion.

sub_agendas_items.title: TC-2026-07 - Reports of broken fare machines

motions.motion_text: There have been numerous reports of broken fare machines on conventional OC Transpo buses, as well as Para Transpo vehicles, can staff please answer the following:

Bogie systems
RTG confirmed the Line 1 LRT vehicles use the Alstom Iponam bogie system, which is different from the Iexege bogie system that was presented to Council in 2012 as the preferred choice.
Excess lateral loads and cartridge axle bearing design
Spalling
At the 14 May Transit committee meeting, RTG representatives referred to bearing spalling as a common occurrence.
Alternative train systems
Comparisons between CBAs used in different systems
Excessive Ice on the Overhead Catenary System
